Task  
Emily runs a dog rescue center and currently has 25 dogs. She receives new dogs on Thursday, Friday, and Saturday. On Thursday, she received [4 puppies] from a nearby town. On Friday, a family brought in a stray dog they had found. On Saturday, 2 families adopted 3 dogs each, which is [6 dogs].  

***  

Emily currently has [25 + 4 + 1 + 6] dogs in her rescue center. The total number of dogs is calculated by adding the initial 25 dogs, the 4 puppies received on Thursday, the 1 stray dog from Friday, and the 6 adopted dogs on Saturday. This results in [66] dogs in her rescue center.  

Task
